name: inject
description: Immediately inject the latest sidecar commons.tape + project.tape into the CURRENT session and sync the local install for the next session. /inject (and `/ij` short alias) runs `sidecar sync` (marketplace pull + cache copy + installed_plugins.json patch) AND prints the current commons.tape + (cwd's) project.tape so the model picks them up this turn. Use after a sidecar ship when you want the new rules to take effect now without restarting Claude Code.
